_publications._publicationTitle: Stepwise crosstalk between aberrant Nf1, Tp53 and Rb signalling pathways induces gliomagenesis in zebrafish.

_contextSnippet: The results showed that the frameshift mutations were detected in >60% fish, indicating that the mutations in brains were efficiently generated in nf1 KO, rb1 KO, and tp53 KO fish
details: Frameshift mutations detected in >60% of fish, with mRNA levels almost undetectable in KO larvae
